name: Gaming Guild
description: Guild hall visual language. Electric indigo + neon emerald palette with glow elevation, deep indigo surfaces, and RPG-inspired data readouts. All standard Decantr components work — this recipe describes how to COMPOSE them for the gaming guild aesthetic.

decorators.gg-glow: Indigo glow box-shadow. Apply to cards, panels, and highlighted elements.
decorators.gg-glow-accent: Emerald glow variant. Apply to success states and accent elements.
decorators.gg-glow-strong: Stronger indigo glow for hero elements and podium highlights.
decorators.gg-glow-pulse: Animated glow pulse (3s loop). Use for live indicators and active states.
decorators.gg-shimmer: Gradient shimmer sweep animation. Apply to #1 rank and featured items.
decorators.gg-rank-up: Scale bounce animation for rank-up moments and level progression.
decorators.gg-float: Subtle vertical floating bob (4s). Apply to emblems and decorative elements.
decorators.gg-xp-bar: XP progress bar with gradient fill. Set --gg-xp for fill percentage.
decorators.gg-badge-pop: Achievement pop-in animation with overshoot. Apply to earned badges.
decorators.gg-mesh: Radial gradient page background with indigo/emerald/violet layers.
decorators.gg-panel: Surface-1 panel with indigo border and rounded corners.
decorators.gg-label: Uppercase micro label with wide letter-spacing.
decorators.gg-data: Monospace tabular-nums readout styling for stats and ranks.
decorators.gg-live: Green pulsing dot indicator for online/live status.

panel.description: Standard guild panel. Surface-1 with indigo border and label header.

card.description: Gaming guild card. Standard Card with glow hover and panel styling.

kpi.description: Guild KPI metric with glow and monospace data readout.

table.description: Data table in guild panel with label column headers.

leaderboard.description: Ranked leaderboard with podium top 3 and scrollable list.

profile-card.description: Player profile card with avatar, rank badge, XP bar, and achievements.

sidebar.description: Guild navigation sidebar with grouped sections and live indicator.

auth-modal.description: Auth modal with guild mesh background and form.

achievement.description: Achievement badge card with pop-in animation.
